CREATE TABLE user_keys (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255), key_data VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO user_keys (id, name, key_data) VALUES (1, 'Sample Symmetric Key', 'EE/uaFF5N3ZNJWUTR8DYe+OEbwaKQnso');
SELECT * FROM user_keys WHERE name = 'Sample Symmetric Key';
INSERT INTO user_keys (id, name, key_data) VALUES (2, 'Sample Key 2', 'AA/QPdQxBBQXyW9P8YMbRz9oXQ4+OEbwaKQnso');
INSERT INTO user_keys (id, name, key_data) VALUES (3, 'Edge Case Key', '');
INSERT INTO user_keys (id, name, key_data) VALUES (4, 'Long Key', 'AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA');
SELECT * FROM user_keys WHERE key_data IS NOT NULL;
SELECT DISTINCT name FROM user_keys WHERE name IN (SELECT name FROM user_keys WHERE LENGTH(key_data) > 0);
SELECT name, key_data FROM user_keys WHERE id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM user_keys);
DELETE FROM user_keys WHERE name = 'Sample Key 2';
SELECT name FROM user_keys WHERE key_data LIKE 'EE/%';
SELECT name, key_data FROM user_keys WHERE name IN (SELECT name FROM user_keys) AND key_data IS NOT NULL;
UPDATE user_keys SET key_data = 'BB/uaFF5N3ZNJWUTR8DYe+OEbwaKQnso' WHERE name = 'Sample Symmetric Key';
SELECT * FROM user_keys WHERE name = 'Sample Symmetric Key' AND id = 1 OR id IN (SELECT id FROM user_keys WHERE LENGTH(key_data) = 0);
